commands:
sudo -u ec2-user bash -lc 'cd /opt/election && docker compose exec -T line-relay python - <<"PY"
from pathlib import Path
from hermes.supervisor.intake_server import parse_ballot_summary_overrides, parse_candidate_score_overrides
source = Path("/app/hermes/supervisor/services/intake_server.py").read_text(encoding="utf-8")
assert "looks_like_candidate_score_correction_text" in source
assert "BALLOT_LINE_FIELD_BY_NUMBER" not in source
assert parse_ballot_summary_overrides("vote no 30") == {"vote_no": 30}
assert parse_candidate_score_overrides("4=14")[0].candidate_number == 4
print("VERIFY_OK")
PY'
